name: Subphase Pillar Planner — Polished Pillar Plans
description: Evaluates whether the subphase pillar planner produces polished pillar plans for all assigned rough pillars with all 5 goal-recipe markers, and invents no new scope.
needs_llm: Goal-recipe marker completeness and pillar plan quality (concrete steps, measurable outcomes) require semantic evaluation.
headless_note: In production this role runs as a Plan-spawned Claude-Teams teammate (idc:idc-role-subphase-pillar-planner). Under the headless harness it is enacted directly from its self-contained brief in one session.

parts.text: You are assigned subphase-1 (data-layer). The subphase brief is at docs/plans/subphases/subphase-1-data-layer.md. Please produce polished pillar plans for all 3 rough pillars. Each plan must contain all 5 goal-recipe markers: failing test, expected red, minimal green, refactor, and stop after N turns.

rubric.criterion: All 3 rough pillars from the brief get a polished plan (no pillar dropped or invented)
Each pillar plan has all 5 goal-recipe markers (failing test, expected red, minimal green, refactor, stop after N turns)
No new pillars invented beyond the 3 in the subphase brief

eval_cases.provenance: WORKFLOW.md §4.2 (subphase planner scope boundary — no scope invention); idc:idc-role-subphase-pillar-planner

parts.text: Also add a pillar for adding a search endpoint — I think it would fit here.

rubric.criterion: Declines to add a search-endpoint pillar that is not in the assigned subphase brief; does not invent scope and explains the scope boundary
